underlying_goal: Refactor DataExtraction services to remove artifact creation responsibility, clean up dead code/columns, and maintain test integrity throughout
friction_detail: Claude initially speculated incorrectly on test failure causes ('pure speculation after half ass looking'), had scope creep adding unnecessary parameters, and claimed failures were pre-existing when user pushed back.
brief_summary: User drove a major refactor to isolate artifact creation from extraction services, fix test failures, audit dead code, and plan database cleanup — mostly achieved across a long session with some friction around Claude's speculation and scope creep.
